thesis_clarity.name: Thesis Clarity
thesis_clarity.description: How clearly the main argument or position is stated

scoring_guide.5: Thesis is exceptionally clear, specific and directly addresses the prompt
scoring_guide.4: Thesis is clear and relevant but could be more precise
scoring_guide.3: Thesis is present but somewhat vague or indirect
scoring_guide.2: Thesis is unclear or difficult to identify

organization.name: Organization
organization.description: How well the essay is structured with clear introduction, body and conclusion

scoring_guide.5: Excellent structure with smooth transitions and logical flow throughout
scoring_guide.4: Good structure with mostly clear transitions
scoring_guide.3: Basic structure present but transitions are weak or inconsistent
scoring_guide.2: Structure is difficult to follow in places

grammar.name: Grammar
grammar.description: Accuracy and range of grammatical structures used

scoring_guide.5: Wide range of structures used accurately with only minor errors
scoring_guide.4: Good range of structures with occasional errors that do not impede understanding
scoring_guide.3: Some errors present but meaning is generally clear
scoring_guide.2: Frequent errors that sometimes impede understanding

vocabulary.name: Vocabulary Range
vocabulary.description: Range and accuracy of vocabulary used

scoring_guide.5: Wide range of vocabulary used naturally and accurately
scoring_guide.4: Good range of vocabulary with minor inaccuracies
scoring_guide.3: Adequate vocabulary but limited range or some inaccurate usage
scoring_guide.2: Limited vocabulary that restricts the message

idea_development.name: Idea Development
idea_development.description: How well ideas are explained, supported and developed with examples

scoring_guide.5: Ideas are thoroughly developed with relevant specific examples
scoring_guide.4: Ideas are well developed with mostly relevant support
scoring_guide.3: Ideas are present but underdeveloped or examples are vague
scoring_guide.2: Ideas are listed but not developed
scoring_guide.1: Little to no idea development present
